prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia stands at the entrance of a maze made of stock data source doors: "akshare", "mootdx", "efinance", "baostock", "tushare". Some doors have locks, speed signs, or price tags. She holds a daily K-line scroll and a small checklist.

Core meaning: the first real obstacle in building a quant system is getting reliable full-market daily K data.

Style: clean Chinese technical blog illustration, black/red/white with small blue data glow, lots of white space. Minimal labels: "数据源迷宫", "全市场日K", "复权".

Avoid investment poster, avoid dense tables, avoid scary maze.
